name: Ghaybooba
overview: The series depicts the social upheaval caused by the introduction of the mobile phone into family homes, transforming it from a means of communication into a double-edged weapon. Events intertwine as the characters’ privacy is breached, and intimate photos and videos become tools of blackmail and defamation, destroying once-stable lives.

trailers.title: البرومو الرسمي لمسلسل "غيبوبة" قريبا في شهر رمضان 🌙 على قناة تلفزة تي في
